lib/app/router/app_router.dart.changes: Added imports for performance benchmark screen and routes
lib/app/router/app_router.dart.impact: Enables navigation to the new performance dashboard

lib/features/home/presentation/screens/h.changes: Added performance benchmark button to home screen
lib/features/home/presentation/screens/h.impact: Provides easy access to performance testing from main navigation

lib/features/performance/performance.dar.changes: Created barrel export file for performance feature
lib/features/performance/performance.dar.impact: Centralizes exports for better module organization

lib/features/performance/presentation/ro.changes: Created route constants for performance dashboard
lib/features/performance/presentation/ro.impact: Standardizes route definitions and prevents route string typos

lib/features/performance/presentation/sc.impact: Main implementation of performance testing dashboard

lib/features/performance/README.md.impact: Provides comprehensive usage guide and best practices

patterns_discovered: Feature-based modular architecture with clear separation between domain, presentation, and routes
Use of ConsumerStatefulWidget with Riverpod for state management
Consistent route naming conventions using constants
Performance metrics capture using specialized utilities
Test-driven development approach with baseline comparison capabilities
gotchas_discovered: Performance metrics depend on VM service availability which may be limited in release mode
Memory metrics may show estimated values when VM service is unavailable
Test results can vary between runs - need multiple runs for accuracy
Some performance tests require profile mode for accurate measurements
Large data generation (500+ items) can impact test execution time

approach_outcome.strategy: Modular feature implementation with clear separation of concerns
approach_outcome.execution: Successfully implemented comprehensive performance dashboard with test selection, metrics display, and baseline comparison
approach_outcome.result: Complete performance testing solution accessible from home screen with detailed documentation

recommendations: Add historical metrics storage and visualization charts
Implement automated test sequences for comprehensive performance checks
Add device information display for better context comparison
Consider adding CI/CD integration for automated performance regression detection
Export functionality for metrics data to external analysis tools
Add performance trend tracking over time
